title: Professional Credential
description: The Professional Credential schema provides a complete professional profile for a real estate professional, combining agent contact information, office affiliation, and professional licensing into a single credential.

franchise.title: Franchise
franchise.description: The real estate franchise or brand the professional is affiliated with.

operating_office.title: Operating Office
operating_office.description: The specific office or branch where the professional operates.

operating_address.title: Operating Address
operating_address.description: The physical address of the operating office.

title.title: Title
title.description: The professional's title or role within the office.

affiliation_start_year.title: Affiliation Start Year
affiliation_start_year.description: The year the professional began their affiliation with the office.

license_number.title: License Number
license_number.description: The professional's BC real estate license number, issued by the regulatory authority.

license_effective_date.title: License Effective Date
license_effective_date.description: The date the professional's license became effective (DD-MM-YYYY).

license_expiry_date.title: License Expiry Date
license_expiry_date.description: The date the professional's license expires and must be renewed (DD-MM-YYYY).

licensed_as.title: Licensed As
licensed_as.description: The category of license held by the professional.

licensed_for.title: Licensed For
licensed_for.description: The service categories the professional is licensed to perform.

prec.title: PREC
prec.description: Indicates whether the professional operates through a Personal Real Estate Corporation (PREC).

business_name.title: Business Name
business_name.description: The name of the Personal Real Estate Corporation or business entity, if applicable.

issuing_authority.title: Issuing Authority
issuing_authority.description: The regulatory body that issued the professional license.
